data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Bulk waiver for recurring visits (annual waiver)', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or availability of this feature, indicating a clear gap in meeting the requirement. The absence of any checks or data related to the bulk waiver functionality directly supports the conclusion that this requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of bulk waiver functionality for recurring visits being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the bulk waiver functionality.
